title: 2 Unbeatable Dividend Stocks Billionaires Keep Buying in a Bear Market
text: Some of the world's most successful investors made big bets on these dividend payers recently.

title: Here's Why Prologis Can Keep Raising Its Dividend
text: This warehouse giant's stock fell hard, but its dividend isn't at any risk. In fact, more dividend hikes are likely in the cards.

title: Why Prologis Is Oversold
text: Prologis has been unfairly negatively impacted by rising interest rates despite effective debt cost containment and accretive revenue/AFFO growth potential following its Duke Realty acquisition. Comparing Prologis to competitors and the broader REIT market, as well as a deep dive into the REIT's financials, indicate the company's growth is currently undervalued.

title: 7 Juicy Dividends to Be Thankful For This Year
text: High-yielding dividend stocks have been some of the safest investments of 2022. In fact, “The recent outperformance of dividend stocks is contrary to the traditional wisdom that they tend to lag the overall market in a rising-rate environment.

title: Prologis: The Silver Lining
text: Prologis is a strong, reliable industrial REIT with a fortress balance sheet and low cost of debt. It stands to benefit from supply constrained markets and high cost of new development for weaker players.

title: 3 Dividend Stocks You'll Be Thankful to Own in 2023 and Beyond
text: These companies could pay a lot in dividends over the coming years.

title: Prologis: Not Cheap But Also Not Broken
text: Prologis has consistently traded at a premium against its REIT peers over the years. However, that premium was significantly digested in 2022. We discuss why PLD remains well-positioned in the logistics space, supported by low vacancy rates and contractual rent escalators.

title: Buy 6 November 2022 Dividend Closers
text: Kiplinger.com, dogsofthedow.com, and growthinvesting.com all published November lists of stocks of note to close this year of 2022. Their seven "closer stock" articles covered: Best Stocks; Best Dow stocks; Prosperous Healthcare Stocks; Top-Rated Housing; Consumer Staples; Inflation Stocks; Tops of 2022.

title: 10 High-Paying REITs to Generate a Stable Passive Income
text: Here are 10 High-Quality REITs that have solid businesses with strong cash flows to pay reliable dividends.

title: The State Of REITs: November 2022 Edition
text: The REIT sector achieved only its 3rd month in the black out of the first 10 months of 2022 with a +8.69% total return in October. Large cap REITs (+2.92%) averaged small gains, micro caps (+7.36%) and mid caps (+8.11%) had moderate gains and small caps (+12.85%) surged.

title: Got $3,000? These Stocks Could Double Your Money by 2030
text: These companies seem highly likely to deliver the returns needed to double an investor's money by the end of this decade.
